Steve Naish

People-Centered Leadership in Insurance Technology Transformation

Web: www.stevenaish.com

About Me

Steve Naish brings a people-centered perspective to insurance technology leadership, focusing on collaboration, alignment, and long-term success. His work centers on helping organizations modernize core systems while supporting the teams responsible for delivering and sustaining those platforms.

At Catlin Group, Naish has spent more than 12 years supporting technology initiatives that impact underwriting, claims, billing, and financial operations. His role frequently involves bridging the gap between business priorities and technical execution, helping stakeholders navigate complex decisions with confidence.

Naish has been closely involved in Guidewire-based transformation efforts, including the evaluation and implementation of ClaimCenter, PolicyCenter, and BillingCenter. He has emphasized solutions that streamline workflows and improve access to reliable data, enabling teams to operate more efficiently and make better-informed decisions.

Through his work at Cognizant, Naish continues to guide insurers through cloud-based modernization initiatives. He works closely with delivery teams and clients to ensure that transformation efforts are practical, well-governed, and aligned with user needs.

Known for his steady and thoughtful leadership style, Naish supports organizations through periods of change by prioritizing communication, shared understanding, and execution discipline.

At the end of the day, Steve is a loving and devoted father who values faith, family, and time outdoors. Whether boating, enjoying nature, or attending church, these moments provide balance, perspective, and a reminder that personal character and consistency matter just as much as professional success.

Steve Naish -
